description: Baseline: council found 24 unique issues. Scores: Claude 6.5, GPT 6, Gemini 8, Grok 5 (avg 6.4/10)

description: Batch 1 fixes: child.pid guard, async killPid, NO_COLOR, AbortSignal, cancel spam, config validation, isAgentDone fast-path, list results.json cache. Council found 22 issues (down from 24). Avg score 6.5 (up from 6.4).

asi.hypothesis: Fix top 10 issues from baseline council: child.pid, killPid, NO_COLOR, AbortSignal, cancel spam, config validation, isAgentDone fast-path, list cache, resolveModels error

asi.remaining_top: code duplication ask/spawn/extension, no tests, stale PID kill, partial text as success, stalled workers hang, implicit ask flag parsing, extension ../../src imports

description: Fixed package.json exports to point to correct dist/src/... paths (was breaking subpath imports after build). Addresses critical packaging bug from council review. Tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Fix package exports mismatch between tsconfig (rootDir=., outDir=dist producing dist/src/) and package.json exports
asi.next_action_hint: Re-run full council review to measure new issues_found, fix test runner warning, address sync FS and PID safety

description: Manual pre-council improvement estimate: tighten PID kill safety, add ask timeout/SIGINT shutdown, centralize run creation, harden watch/results paths, improve CLI parsing, and add tests. npm test && npm run build pass; next council run should find fewer process-management and UX issues.
Validation-only run: npm test exits 0 but still emits 'node:test run() is being called recursively' warning, confirming the test runner is misconfigured and providing false confidence. No code kept.
Command-only probe: switching from `node --import tsx --test` to `npx tsx --test` still emits the recursive node:test warning, so the problem is not the package.json wrapper alone.

Validation run crashed: `npm test && npm run build` timed out during the test phase after invoking `npm run build:test && node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs`. Current test runner wiring appears inconsistent/stuck, so no improvement was kept.

asi.hypothesis: Validate the in-progress test runner changes by running the full test+build pipeline and confirm the recursive node:test warning is gone
asi.rollback_reason: Full validation timed out before tests completed, indicating the current test harness configuration is broken or inconsistent
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect the actual package.json/scripts currently on disk, locate the referenced scripts/run-node-tests.mjs entrypoint, and run the test steps individually to isolate where the hang occurs
asi.failure_mode: timeout during npm test after build:test

description: Attempted to replace the test runner with a compiled-JS wrapper, but the experiment command timed out during validation before producing a trustworthy result. Discarding this path and re-investigating the environment-specific cause of the recursive node:test warning.

Validation run timed out before finishing `npm test && npm run build`, so current uncommitted test-runner changes are not yet trustworthy. Need to inspect why test execution hung and why experiment output referenced a stale test script.

asi.hypothesis: Current local changes should eliminate the recursive node:test warning and keep build green
asi.rollback_reason: Experiment timed out after entering npm test, so no reliable improvement was demonstrated
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect current test runner wiring and run the test/build steps separately to isolate the hang and stale-script discrepancy
asi.observed_issue: run_experiment output mentioned `node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs` despite current package.json showing `node --import tsx --test test/*.test.ts`
